name: Vegetable Risotto
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and walnuts. Fry, stirring frequently until the nuts are lightly browned.
3. Remove with a slotted spoon.
4. Add onions and green pepper; cook until slightly softened.
5. Stir in rice and season to taste.
6. Gradually add vegetable stock, bringing it to a simmer.
7. Cover and reduce heat to low. Simmer gently for about 10 minutes or so, stirring occasionally, until the liquid is absorbed.
8. Mix tomatoes and olives together.
9. Add corn and peas; stir into the risotto in the skillet.
10. Place tomatoes and olives on top of the mixture without stirring them in.
11. Replace the lid and simmer for 5 minutes.
12. Before serving, stir in black olives, tomatoes, walnuts, and fresh herbs.
13. Serve with a salad.
